description: This sub-concept focuses on the temporal structure of the sound. Positive examples involve sounds with a discernible rhythm or pattern, while negative examples describe continuous or static sounds.
positive: The ticking clock, a steady beat against my temple, pulses with a predictable rhythm.
Mein Herz schlägt einen klaren Takt, a palpable rhythm resonating in my chest.
Le battute del tamburo africano vibrano attraverso le mie gambe, a distinct, pulsing pattern.
A rhythmic whooshing sound, like ocean waves, brushes against my ears.
The metronomic drip of the faucet, a persistent, repeating sequence against the silence.
Siento el latido de mi sangre, a constant, pulsing rhythm in my wrists.
The whirring of the fan blades creates a cyclical motion I can feel in my shoulders.
J'entends le tic-tac régulier d'une machine, a clear, repeating pulse in the air.
My breath, a rhythmic rise and fall, expands and contracts my abdomen.
The regular thud of the bass drum vibrates through the floor, felt in my feet.
Un ticchettio costante, a palpable rhythm, against my cheek as I lie on the pillow.
The rhythmic clicking of the train wheels, a predictable cadence felt through the seat.
Le pulsations du tambour tribal, a distinct rhythm felt in my lower back.
My pulse, a clear, regular rhythm, throbs in my neck.
Der gleichmäßige Rhythmus des Herzens, I feel it vibrating in my throat.
La cadenza del mio respiro, a rhythmic expansion and contraction in my ribs.
The rhythmic hum of the refrigerator, a low, pulsing drone in the kitchen.
Siento el golpeteo del martillo, a recurring beat against my hand.
The rhythmic creaking of the wooden floorboards under my weight.
J'entends le rythme régulier d'une chaîne de montage, a steady pulse in the factory.
negative: A constant, unwavering hum fills the room, a continuous drone against my skin.
The static hiss of the amplifier, a persistent, unchanging sound in my ears.
A flat, continuous tone vibrates through the floor, a lack of any discernible rhythm.
The unchanging drone of the machinery, a continuous presence against my jaw.
Il suono continuo di una cascata, a static wash against my face.
Ein gleichmäßiges Rauschen, a constant, unbroken sound, envelops me.
The persistent buzz of the fluorescent light, a static hum against my forehead.
Le son continu d'un bourdonnement, a lack of rhythm felt in my chest.
A sustained, unchanging note vibrates through my bones, a lack of pattern.
Siento un zumbido constante, a static presence in my ears.
The unchanging drone of the air conditioner, a continuous hum felt in my legs.
Un ronzio costante, a lack of any discernible rhythm, in the background.
J'entends un sifflement continu, a static sound against my ribs.
The unwavering hum of the power lines, a continuous presence felt in my scalp.
Der gleichmäßige Klang des Windes, a static sound felt against my arm.
La melodia continua di un fischio, a lack of rhythm felt in my stomach.
The static crackle of the radio, a continuous, unchanging sound.
Siento un zumbido persistente, a static presence in my head.
J'entends un bourdonnement continu, a lack of pattern felt in my toes.
The unchanging drone of the refrigerator motor, a continuous presence.
